svg.title: Angular app/ folder structure diagram
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing app.ts at the root wiring into config, core, layouts, features, and shared zones. Features lazy-load and consume shared UI kit and core singletons.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does AppComponent in app.ts do — is it just a router-outlet wrapper or does it hold state?')
sendPrompt('What does ApplicationConfig in app.config.ts provide — providers, routes, HTTP setup?')
sendPrompt('How does runtime-config.ts load /config.json at startup and make it available before the first component renders?')
sendPrompt('What PrimeNG global config goes in primeng.config.ts — ripple, input style, translation?')
sendPrompt('What does AuthService manage vs AuthStore — is AuthStore a signal-based store holding session state?')
sendPrompt('What are all 8 functional interceptors and what order should they run in?')
sendPrompt('How do authGuard and permissionGuard work — do they redirect to login or to the 403 error page?')
sendPrompt('What does CustomPreloader do — does it preload all lazy routes or only routes with a specific flag?')
sendPrompt('What primitive does BaseStore expose — a signal-backed store with select, update, and reset?')
sendPrompt('What do RouteMetadata and CurrentUser models look like — are they typed interfaces or classes with methods?')
sendPrompt('What does app-shell render — is the sub-nav driven by route metadata or a separate signal?')
sendPrompt('When does auth-layout activate — is it a separate route or an outlet inside app-shell?')
sendPrompt('What does error-layout render — a full-page shell or just the error component with minimal chrome?')
sendPrompt('What does the dashboard feature show and what signals does it read?')
sendPrompt('How does LoginComponent trigger the BFF OIDC redirect — a plain anchor or programmatic navigation?')
sendPrompt('How does UsersStore extend BaseStore and what state does it hold?')
sendPrompt('Are the 403, 500, offline, and 404 pages standalone components with their own routes?')
sendPrompt('What lives in __demo/ — is it behind a feature flag or a separate lazy route guarded from prod?')
sendPrompt('What are the dph/* components — are they wrappers around PrimeNG with standardised inputs or completely custom?')
sendPrompt('What directives live in shared/directives — permission-based visibility, auto-focus, click-outside?')
sendPrompt('What pipes are in shared/pipes — date formatting, truncation, safe HTML?')
